description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker in a deep maroon color, featuring a classic rubber toe cap and a white rubber sole with a textured bumper. The shoe has metal eyelets for lacing, with white laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The inner lining appears to be a light beige fabric, and the tongue is slightly padded for comfort. On the outer ankle area, there is a circular patch with a star logo, typical of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star shoes. The shoe shows some creasing and minor wear, especially around the ankle and toe areas, but the structure remains intact. The overall design is iconic and widely recognized in urban fashion.
description: A maroon high-top canvas sneaker with a white rubber toe cap, white laces, and a circular star logo patch on the ankle. The shoe shows minor wear and features a classic urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon canvas, white laces, and rubber toe cap, with visible creasing around the ankle.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the lacing, toe cap, and the slightly padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the circular star logo patch and metal eyelets, with more of the sole visible.
description_view_3: Rear angle showing the heel seam and the back of the sole, with the canvas material and stitching details.
attribute_logo: Circular patch with a blue star and text, located on the outer ankle area.
